cotizador.title: Select your Modality
cotizador.subtitle: Choose the type of quote that best suits your shipping needs

aereo.title: Air
aereo.description: Air freight quotation with rates per kilogram in different weight ranges
aereo.comparisonDescription: Perfect for urgent shipments or high-value products. Guaranteed speed with competitive rates based on weight.

fcl.title: Maritime FCL
fcl.description: Full Container Load with rates per complete container (20GP, 40HQ, 40NOR)
fcl.description3: Delivery in longer times and lower cost
fcl.comparisonDescription: Ideal for large volumes. Exclusive container for maximum security and better cost per unit transported.

lcl.title: Maritime LCL
lcl.description: Less than Container Load with rates per maritime consolidation
lcl.comparisonDescription: Economic solution for medium volumes. Share container space optimizing costs without sacrificing quality.

lastmile.title: Last Mile
lastmile.description: Domestic ground transportation from port to final destination
lastmile.comparisonDescription: Ground transportation service to move your cargo from the port to its final destination within the country.

terrestre.title: Ground Transport
terrestre.description: Quote parcel and LTL rates via Envia (Mexico, Central America and USA)
terrestre.comparisonDescription: Door-to-door quotes via Envia.com with Seemann markup, separate from Last Mile.

footer.tagline: Leader in international logistics solutions with more than 35 years of experience. We connect your business with the world.

QuoteAIR.title: Air Quote
QuoteAIR.subtitle: Generate quotes for air shipments
QuoteAIR.seleccionamejor: Select the best option for your shipment
QuoteAIR.ingresomanual: Enter the total weight and volume manually instead of per piece
QuoteAIR.info1: Length or width cannot exceed 3.0 m (300 cm). The cargo is considered oversize and must be quoted on a case-by-case basis with your executive
QuoteAIR.info2: Height cannot exceed 2.4 m (240 cm). Cargo exceeding this height is not suitable for air transport
QuoteAIR.cobropor: Charged based on the greater of:
QuoteAIR.ingresavalor: Enter the total value of your cargo
QuoteAIR.segurocargo: You must enter the value of the goods to calculate the insurance.
QuoteAIR.cotizaciongenerada: This only generates a quotation without creating an operation in the system. You will receive a PDF for your review. Ideal for comparing options!
QuoteAIR.operaciongenerada: Automatically creates an operation in the system and notifies your account executive. The shipping process starts here.
QuoteAIR.seleccionarruta: You must select a route before generating the quote
QuoteAIR.error: There was an error in the quotation.
QuoteAIR.generarpdf: The quotation PDF will be downloaded automatically in a few moments.
QuoteAIR.duplicateCarrierTooltip: The price difference is due to rates provided directly by the freight agent.
QuoteAIR.intenta: No routes available for the selected origin and destination.
QuoteAIR.limitemaximo: The system allows a maximum of 10 pieces per quote.
QuoteAIR.sobre10: For shipments with more than 10 pieces, please contact your account manager for a tailored review and quotation.
QuoteAIR.rutaanalisis: Case-by-case for this lane—please share cargo details for a spot assessment.
QuoteAIR.comunicacioneje: Please contact your commercial representative to obtain a personalized quotation according to your cargo specifications.
QuoteAIR.oversize: The length and/or width exceeds 300 cm. This cargo is considered oversize and must be quoted on a case-by-case basis.
QuoteAIR.altura: The height exceeds 240 cm. This cargo cannot be handled via air transport.
QuoteAIR.alturasupera: The height exceeds 160 cm. This cargo requires cargo flights. Please check with your executive if the selected rate corresponds to cargo flights.
QuoteAIR.seleccionarincoterm: You must select an Incoterm before generating the quote.
QuoteAIR.desglose: The cost breakdown will be available in the PDF when generating the quote or operation.
QuoteAIR.sincronizadoConAduana: Synced with the value entered in Customs Agency
QuoteAIR.sincronizadoConSeguro: Synced with the value entered in Insurance

Pieceaccordionair.noapilableTooltip: Cargo that cannot have anything stacked on top of it

WeightRangeAlert.sinPrecioEnRango: No rate available for this weight range
WeightRangeAlert.pesoActualEnRango: Your current chargeable weight is {{peso}} kg, which falls in the {{rango}} range. This route has no pricing available for that range.
WeightRangeAlert.airFreightPesoMinimo: Air Freight charged at minimum weight of the next available range
WeightRangeAlert.infoAjustePeso: Your cargo is {{peso}} kg (range {{rango}}), but this route has no rate for that range. In accordance with airline tariff rules Air Freight will be charged at the minimum weight of the next available range: {{pesoMinimo}} kg ({{rangoSiguiente}}).
WeightRangeAlert.calculoAirFreight: Air Freight: charged at {{pesoAirFreight}} kg (minimum weight for the range)
WeightRangeAlert.otrosCargosNormal: Handling, AWB, Airport Transfer and other charges: calculated based on {{peso}} kg.
WeightRangeAlert.sugerencia: You need a minimum of {{pesoMinimo}} kg (range {{rangoSiguiente}}) to quote this route.
WeightRangeAlert.ajustarPeso: Adjust your cargo weight or select another route that has a rate for your current range.
WeightRangeAlert.sinRangoDisponible: No higher weight ranges are available for this route. Please contact your account executive.
WeightRangeAlert.segundoaviso: All other charges (Handling, AWB, Airport Transfer, etc.) remain based on your declared weight of {{peso}} kg.

OversizeNotify.title: Quote requires special analysis
OversizeNotify.explanation: Your cargo has special characteristics that cannot be quoted automatically. A Seemann Group executive must review your request on a case-by-case basis to provide you with the best available rate.
OversizeNotify.fillFieldsReminder: Please complete all shipment details (origin, destination, dimensions and weight of the pieces) before notifying your executive. All the information you enter will be sent directly to your account executive.
OversizeNotify.sent: Your executive has been notified successfully! They will contact you shortly.
OversizeNotify.error: An error occurred while sending the notification. Please try again.
OversizeNotify.missingData: Complete at least the origin, destination and piece data to notify your executive.
OversizeNotify.reason_no-apta-aereo: Not suitable for air transport (height > 240 cm)
OversizeNotify.reason_oversize-maritimo: Maritime Oversize Cargo (exceeds container limits: L 1203 / W 234 / H 259 cm)

OversizeNotifyLCL.largoMsg: One or more pieces exceed 1203 cm in length. This cargo is considered oversize and requires a special quote.
OversizeNotifyLCL.anchoMsg: One or more pieces exceed 234 cm in width. This cargo is considered oversize and requires a special quote.
OversizeNotifyLCL.altoMsg: One or more pieces exceed 259 cm in height. This cargo is considered oversize and requires a special quote.

hero.title: Your cargo, our promise
hero.subtitle: Learn who we are, what we commit to you, and how we work across each logistics modality.

promesas.disclaimer: Timelines, rates and conditions may vary depending on the operation, regulations and external factors. This information is for guidance only and does not constitute a guarantee of a specific outcome.

company.storyHeadline: Over three decades connecting businesses with the world

history.title: History
history.p1: Seemann Group was born from the vast experience of its founders in insurance, reinsurance and international logistics, with more than 35 years of development.
history.p2: Its strength lies in providing professional and technical advice to clients, always evaluating the best alternative to meet their objectives.
history.p3: Throughout its trajectory, useful and versatile tools have been developed for different company sizes, allowing effective work with small, medium and large companies in Latin America, recently in the United States and soon in Europe.

mission.title: Mission
mission.p1: Seemann Group is dedicated to international cargo transportation and freight forwarding, with a strong service vocation. We base our commercial proposal on customer satisfaction with the work provided.
mission.p2: We are a flexible organization prepared to face market changes, with professionals from various areas focused on service, working under pressure and oriented to change.

vision.title: Vision
vision.p1: We seek to be a solid company worldwide, with relevant international expansion and greater coverage in strategic economies.
vision.p2: Internally, we continue developing continuous improvement processes that allow us to evaluate and optimize the quality of our service.

values.title: Values
values.intro: Among our company's corporate values are:

empathy.title: Empathy and customer orientation
empathy.description: Our main objective is to deliver high-quality professional service, where customer satisfaction with the work performed is paramount.

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.description: Knowledge and empathy with our clients, developing high-impact personalized solutions.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: With information management, commitments made and the treatment of operations as a whole.

sincerity.title: Sincerity and transparency
sincerity.description: Commitment to providing reliable information in a timely manner.

commitment.title: Commitment and proactivity
commitment.description: In the search for solutions that provide optimization in our clients' operations.

flexibility.title: Flexibility
flexibility.description: Being an organization oriented to changes, with quick adaptation to client and environment needs.

commitments.intro: We work so you gain speed and efficiency on every shipment. These pillars guide our relationship with you:

global.title: Own global network
global.desc: Direct presence in several countries: fewer intermediaries, faster coordination.

anticipate.title: Anticipation
anticipate.desc: We work to identify documentary and customs risks before they affect your cargo.

experience.title: 35+ years of experience
experience.desc: Proven routes, consolidated processes and express solutions when you need them.

support.title: Agile response
support.desc: Support focused on resolving operational urgencies with the available team.

clientItems.item1: Advise you professionally to choose the logistics alternative best suited to your objectives.
clientItems.item2: Maintain clear communication about the progress of your operations and required documentation.
clientItems.item3: Manage each shipment rigorously, safeguarding confidential information and agreed commitments.
clientItems.item4: Seek competitive and transparent commercial conditions, negotiated with carriers and partners.
clientItems.item5: Support you with a dedicated executive who knows your operation and can respond with agility.

services.promisesTitle: How we work in this modality

hero.title: Ocean transport
hero.subtitle: Direct negotiation with carriers for competitive rates and better conditions: free days, drop-off and timely document issuance.

f1.title: Competitive rates
f1.desc: Direct negotiation with carriers for better commercial conditions and free days.

f2.title: Worldwide coverage
f2.desc: Positioning in major and secondary ports with certified agents.

f3.title: FCL and LCL
f3.desc: Solutions for full containers and consolidated cargo with operational flexibility.

sea.overview: We commit to rigorous negotiation on maritime contracts, seeking competitive rates and favorable conditions on free days, drop-off and document issuance at destination.

promises.item1: Coordinate FCL, LCL and special cargo according to volume and commodity type.
promises.item2: Inform you about relevant shipment milestones and associated documentation.
promises.item3: Work with our network at origin and destination ports you require.

hero.title: Air transport
hero.subtitle: Express solutions for urgent, high-value or time-critical cargo, with access to major cargo airlines.

f1.title: Speed
f1.desc: Reduced transit times for urgent and high-value cargo.

f2.title: Global network
f2.desc: Access to cargo airlines and direct routes at major hubs.

f3.title: Special cargo
f3.desc: Experience in pharma, perishables, dangerous goods and oversize.

air.overview: We evaluate route, airline and conditions based on urgency and cargo characteristics, prioritizing options that balance time, cost and operational safety.

promises.item1: Review documentary and regulatory requirements before shipment.
promises.item2: Propose route alternatives when weight, size or product restrictions apply.
promises.item3: Maintain shipment visibility while information is available.

hero.title: Ground transport
hero.subtitle: Partnerships with certified carriers for pickup and delivery with agile, secure service and tracking when available.

f1.title: Regional coverage
f1.desc: Partnerships with local carriers in South America and North America.

f2.title: Secure cargo
f2.desc: Security protocols and cargo insurance with certified partners.

f3.title: Timely delivery
f3.desc: Proactive coordination to meet agreed deadlines.

land.overview: We coordinate pickup and delivery in operations involving ground transit, seeking optimal service conditions and timely delivery.

promises.item1: Adapt LTL or FTL solutions according to volume, route and deadlines.
promises.item2: Coordinate documentation required for ground transit.
promises.item3: Inform you about transport progress when the partner reports updates.

hero.title: Customs service
hero.subtitle: Customs management with specialized teams for import, export and special regimes in Chile and international coordination.

f1.title: Technical advice
f1.desc: Guidance on documentary and regulatory requirements applicable to your operation.

f2.title: Full clearance
f2.desc: Customs procedure management with progress tracking.

f3.title: Compliance
f3.desc: Focus on transparency and correct goods declaration.

customs.overview: We support you in customs procedures with teams familiar with current regulations, seeking to streamline clearance within the applicable legal framework.

promises.item1: Review documentation prior to arrival or shipment when applicable.
promises.item2: Inform you about customs procedure status in a timely manner.
promises.item3: Coordinate with transport and warehousing for an integrated operation.

hero.title: Multimodal service
hero.subtitle: Route design combining ocean, air and ground under a single coordination to optimize time and cost.

f1.title: End-to-end route
f1.desc: A single point of contact for the entire logistics chain.

f2.title: Optimization
f2.desc: Combination of modalities according to cost, deadline and cargo type.

f3.title: Visibility
f3.desc: Centralized tracking of each leg of the operation.

multimodal.overview: We design solutions integrating different modalities, centralizing coordination to simplify your foreign trade operation.

promises.item1: Propose multimodal schemes suited to your origin, destination and deadlines.
promises.item2: Coordinate transshipments and connections between modalities in advance.
promises.item3: Maintain a single point of contact throughout the operation.

contenedores.title: Container types
contenedores.subtitle: Technical reference for dimensions, capacities and maximum weights per common ISO ocean freight standards.
contenedores.disclaimer: Dimensions and weights may vary by carrier, manufacturer and build year. Use this information as an operational reference.
contenedores.imageHint: Upload container images to R2 under /contenedores/{type}.png (e.g. /contenedores/20gp.png).

20gp.name: 20' GP (Dry Standard)
20gp.description: 20-foot dry container. Most used for general cargo and medium-volume exports.

40gp.name: 40' GP (Dry Standard)
40gp.description: 40-foot dry container with standard height. Ideal for large volumes at lower cost per m³.

40hq.name: 40' HQ / HC (High Cube)
40hq.description: 40-foot container with extra height (+30 cm). Widely used in FCL for greater cubic capacity.

40nor.name: 40' NOR (Non-Operating Reefer)
40nor.description: Reefer container used as dry when temperature control is not required. Reduced internal volume.

45hc.name: 45' HC (High Cube)
45hc.description: 45-foot high cube container. Maximum capacity on routes that allow it.

20rf.name: 20' RF (Reefer)
20rf.description: 20-foot refrigerated container for perishable or temperature-controlled cargo.

40rh.name: 40' RH (Reefer High Cube)
40rh.description: 40-foot high cube reefer. Greater volume for consolidated refrigerated cargo.

20ot.name: 20' OT (Open Top)
20ot.description: Open top container with tarpaulin roof. For cargo that cannot enter through the door or requires top loading.

40fr.name: 40' FR (Flat Rack)
40fr.description: 40-foot flat rack for oversize cargo, machinery or project cargo.

contactenos.title: Contact Us
contactenos.lead: For quotes, shipments in progress or day-to-day questions, your executive is usually the fastest route. For general company matters, you can also reach Seemann Group directly.
contactenos.executiveText: They know your account and coordinate your shipments.
contactenos.noExecutive: We couldn't find an executive assigned to your account. Write to contacto@seemanngroup.com and we'll help.
contactenos.generalText: If you prefer a general channel or don't have your executive's details handy:
contactenos.asideText: Business hours: Monday to Friday, 8:30AM–5:30PM (Chile time).

reportarError.title: Found an error?
reportarError.lead: Sometimes a button doesn't respond, a figure doesn't add up, or a screen gets stuck loading. Tell us what you saw and we'll look into it.
reportarError.helpText: No need for a long report. A couple of lines and a screenshot if you have one is usually enough.

examples.item1: What you were doing (quoting, tracking, downloading a PDF…).
examples.item2: What you expected to happen vs. what actually happened.

reportarError.contextLabel: This will be included in your email
reportarError.contextNote: So you don't have to look this up when writing.
reportarError.footnote: We reply on business days. If it's urgent for an operation in progress, also notify your executive.
reportarError.mailBodyDescribe: I noticed something odd in the portal:

itinerarioPage.title: Find an itinerary
itinerarioPage.subtitle: Check available routes by modality, origin and destination.

airShipments.title: Your air shipments
airShipments.description: View and manage your air operations. From here you can check status, track shipments and review details for each delivery.

oceanShipments.title: Your ocean shipments
oceanShipments.description: View and manage your ocean operations. Check status, track containers and review every detail of your shipments.

groundShipments.title: Your ground shipments
groundShipments.description: Check the status and details of your ground operations. Review routes, carriers and delivery dates.

quotes.title: Your quotes
quotes.description: Review the details, validity and status of all your quotes. From here you can check rates and request new quotes.

specialQuote.title: Need a special quote?
specialQuote.description: Oversized cargo, project cargo, temperature-controlled goods, hazardous materials or other special conditions. Your executive will find the best solution.

shippingOrder.title: Active operations
shippingOrder.description: The information shown here is tentative and may change. You will receive your AWB or HBL early so you can start tracking your cargo before the operation appears in the shipment views.

airTracking.title: Tracking service for air cargo
airTracking.description:
Enter exactly the AWB provided by your airline. An incorrect number will consume credits unnecessarily.

Don't know your AWB? Check it in Air Operations.

oceanTracking.title: Tracking service for ocean cargo
oceanTracking.description:
Enter the container or booking number provided by your carrier. The system will automatically detect the corresponding carrier.

Don't know your container? Check it in Ocean Operations.

myDocuments.title: Documentation
myDocuments.description: View and manage all documents related to your shipments. Here you'll find invoices, air waybills, manifests and more — all in one place for your convenience.
